entities.name: Trust networks
entities.context: Networks (like alumni associations) that enable referrals but are often throttled by coordination costs and information decay

entities.name: Readiness state
entities.context: Perpetually ready and indexed candidate data that enables instant referrals at digital speed rather than manual search

entities.name: 2-story minimum
entities.context: Technical mechanism that enables the readiness state for Careerspan candidates

entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company that uses AI to maintain candidate readiness for trust-based referrals

entities.name: Alumni associations
entities.context: Example of trust networks that can transform from manual talent brokers to platform orchestrators

entities.name: Platform orchestrators
entities.context: What institutions become when they reduce latency - high-frequency infrastructure layers for talent

entities.name: Coordination costs
entities.context: Friction that throttles trust networks, removed by AI-maintained candidate indexing

entities.name: Information decay
entities.context: Problem in trust networks where candidate data becomes stale without constant maintenance

relationships.context: Technical mechanism enabling readiness state for candidates
The mechanism that technically enables perpetual candidate readiness
Alumni associations are a primary example of trust networks
Readiness state eliminates coordination costs by keeping data perpetually indexed
Reducing latency transforms trust networks from manual brokers to platform orchestrators
Core operational model for enabling high-velocity alumni placements
